description: LabscriptAI OT — consume runtime outbox and inject goal continuation

hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && OPENTRONS_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" PLUGIN_DATA="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" node scripts/consume-runtime-outbox.mjs --host claudecode --hook-event SessionStart --session-id "${OPENTRONS_SESSION_ID:-self-recovery-liquid}"

cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && OPENTRONS_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" PLUGIN_DATA="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" node scripts/consume-runtime-outbox.mjs --host claudecode --hook-event UserPromptSubmit --session-id "${OPENTRONS_SESSION_ID:-self-recovery-liquid}"

cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && OPENTRONS_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" PLUGIN_DATA="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" node scripts/consume-runtime-outbox.mjs --host claudecode --hook-event Stop --session-id "${OPENTRONS_SESSION_ID:-self-recovery-liquid}"
